---
title: "Annotated species checklist (Zoosystema-ready) — Material examined"
author: "Mike Hedde"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  word_document:
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(janitor)
library(stringr)
library(glue)
library(purrr)
library(stringi)
library(lubridate)

knitr::opts_knit$set(encoding = "UTF-8")

fix_utf8 <- function(x) {
  if (!is.character(x)) return(x)
  # convertit vers UTF-8 et remplace les octets invalides
  x <- iconv(x, from = "", to = "UTF-8", sub = "")
  enc2utf8(x)
}
to_utf8 <- function(x) fix_utf8(x)
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a)) a else b
```

# 1. Inputs

```{r inputs}
in_obs  <- "C:/Users/heddemic/Documents/Codes R/RMQS-biodiv/data/raw-data/1.faune/all_clean.csv"
in_meta <- "C:/Users/heddemic/Documents/Codes R/RMQS-biodiv/data/raw-data/1.faune/station_metadata.csv"

if (!file.exists(in_obs))  stop("Missing file: ", in_obs)
if (!file.exists(in_meta)) stop("Missing file: ", in_meta)
```

# 2. Read data (UTF-8, ';' separated)

```{r read-data}
obs0 <- read_delim(
  in_obs,
  delim = ";",
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  locale = locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), to_utf8))%>%
  # Filtrer la bdd
  filter(family == "Formicidae") %>%  #ou project=="RMQS"
  select(-indet)

meta0 <- read_delim(
  in_meta,
  delim = ";",
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  locale = locale(encoding = "UTF-8")
) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), to_utf8))

needed_obs <- c("yr","city","station","method", "phylum", "class", "order","family","cd_nom","valid_name", "name",
                "male","female","juv", "tot_abund", "determinateur")
miss_obs <- setdiff(needed_obs, names(obs0))
if (length(miss_obs) > 0) stop("Missing columns in obs: ", paste(miss_obs, collapse=", "))
```

# 3. Standardise keys + filter to species-level

```{r standardise}
norm_city <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    toupper() %>%
    stringi::stri_trans_general("Latin-ASCII") %>%
    str_replace_all("[^A-Z0-9]+", "-") %>%
    str_replace_all("(^-|-$)", "")
}

obs <- obs0 %>%
  mutate(
    valid_name = na_if(valid_name, ""),
    cd_nom = suppressWarnings(as.integer(cd_nom)),
    genus   = word(name, 1),
    species = word(name, 2),
    is_binom = str_detect(name, "^[A-Z][a-z]+\\s[a-z-]+$"),
    n_ind_row = rowSums(across(c(male, female, juv, tot_abund)), na.rm = TRUE),
    yr2 = str_sub(as.character(yr), 3, 4),
    city_norm = norm_city(city),
  ) %>%
  filter(is_binom, n_ind_row > 0, !is.na(name)) %>%
  rename(order_tax = order) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), to_utf8))

meta <- meta0 %>%
  mutate(
    city_norm = norm_city(city),
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), to_utf8))
```

# 4. Join metadata to observations (station key if possible; else city)

```{r join-meta}
use_station_key <- "nom_station" %in% names(meta) && any(!is.na(meta$nom_station)) &&
                   "rmqs_station_key" %in% names(obs)

obs2 <- if (use_station_key) {
  obs %>% left_join(meta, by = c("rmqs_station_key" = "nom_station"), suffix = c("_obs","_meta"))
} else {
  message("Joining meta by city_norm (station key not available).")
  obs %>% left_join(meta, by = c("city_norm" = "city_norm"), suffix = c("_obs","_meta"))
}

obs2 <- obs2 %>%
  mutate(
    pays   = if ("pays"   %in% names(.)) .data[["pays"]]   else NA_character_,
    region = if ("region" %in% names(.)) .data[["region"]] else NA_character_,
    num_dpt    = if ("num_dpt"    %in% names(.)) .data[["num_dpt"]]    else NA_character_
  ) 
```

# 5. Helpers (methods, counts, month-year only)

```{r helpers}
norm_method <- function(x) {
  recode(str_squish(as.character(x)),
         "pitfall-trap" = "pitfall trap",
         "xshape-trap"  = "X-shaped pitfall trap",
         "soil-core"    = "soil core",
         "hand-sorting" = "hand sorting",
         "dvac"         = "D-vac",
         .default = as.character(x))
}

# vectorised counts formatter
fmt_counts_vec <- function(m, f, j) {
  m <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(m))
  f <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(f))
  j <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(j))

  out <- rep(NA_character_, length(m))
  for (k in seq_along(m)) {
    parts <- c(
      if (!is.na(m[k]) && m[k] > 0) glue("{m[k]} ♂") else NA,
      if (!is.na(f[k]) && f[k] > 0) glue("{f[k]} ♀") else NA,
      if (!is.na(j[k]) && j[k] > 0) glue("{j[k]} juv.") else NA
    )
    parts <- parts[!is.na(parts)]
    if (length(parts) > 0) out[k] <- paste(parts, collapse = ", ")
  }
  out
}


fmt_my <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
  d <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(x))
  miss <- is.na(d) & !is.na(x)
  if (any(miss)) {
    d2 <- suppressWarnings(lubridate::dmy(x[miss]))
    d[miss] <- as.Date(d2)
  }
  out <- rep(NA_character_, length(x))
  ok <- !is.na(d)
  out[ok] <- paste0(as.character(as.roman(as.integer(format(d[ok], "%m")))), "-", format(d[ok], "%Y"))
  out
}

fmt_geo <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_squish() %>%
    str_to_lower(locale = "fr") %>%
    stri_trans_totitle(locale = "fr_FR") %>%
    # remettre en minuscules les particules fréquentes
    str_replace_all("\\b(De|Du|Des|La|Le|Les|D'|L')\\b", ~ str_to_lower(.x, locale = "fr")) %>%
    # gérer "d’" typographique si besoin
    str_replace_all("D’", "d’") %>%
    str_replace_all("L’", "l’")
}

collapse_safe <- function(x, sep = " • ", max_bytes = 20000) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & nzchar(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(character(0))
  out <- character()
  cur <- ""
  for (s in x) {
    add <- if (cur == "") s else paste0(cur, sep, s)
    if (nchar(add, type = "bytes") > max_bytes) {
      out <- c(out, cur)
      cur <- s
    } else {
      cur <- add
    }
  }
  if (cur != "") out <- c(out, cur)
  out
}


fmt_my <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    dmy() %>%                        # calendrier français
    { ifelse(is.na(.), NA_character_,
             paste0(
               tolower(c("I","II","III","IV","V","VI","VII","VIII","IX","X","XI","XII")[month(.)]),
               "-",
               year(.)
             )
    )}
}

fmt_taxon_header <- function(valid_name, cd_nom) {
  valid_name <- as.character(valid_name)

  vapply(seq_along(valid_name), function(i) {
    nm <- str_squish(valid_name[i])
    if (is.na(nm) || nm == "") {
      return(paste0("(TAXREF CD_NOM: ", cd_nom[i], ")."))
    }

    w <- str_split(nm, "\\s+")[[1]]
    if (length(w) >= 2) {
      binom <- paste(w[1], w[2])
      rest  <- if (length(w) > 2) paste(w[-c(1,2)], collapse = " ") else ""
      paste0("*", binom, "*", if (rest != "") paste0(" ", rest) else "",
             " (TAXREF CD_NOM: ", cd_nom[i], ").")
    } else {
      paste0(nm, " (TAXREF CD_NOM: ", cd_nom[i], ").")
    }
  }, FUN.VALUE = character(1))
}

```

# 6. Build lots

```{r lots}
lots0 <- obs2 %>%
  mutate(method2 = norm_method(method)) %>%
  group_by(
    class, order_tax, family, valid_name, cd_nom,
    pays, region, num_dpt, alt,
    city_obs = city_norm, station, habitat,
    date, method2, determinateur
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    male   = sum(as.integer(male), na.rm = TRUE),
    female = sum(as.integer(female), na.rm = TRUE),
    juv    = sum(as.integer(juv), na.rm = TRUE),
    nb     = sum(as.integer(tot_abund), na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

lots <- lots0 %>%
  mutate(
    counts   = fmt_counts_vec(male, female, juv),
    my       = fmt_my(date),

    pays_fmt    = fmt_geo(pays),
    region_fmt  = fmt_geo(region),
    num_dpt_fmt = fmt_geo(num_dpt),
    city_fmt    = fmt_geo(city_obs)
  ) %>%
  # ---- NEW: total "ind." au niveau localité (toutes méthodes + det confondus)
  group_by(class, order_tax, family, valid_name, cd_nom, region_fmt,
           city_fmt, num_dpt_fmt, habitat, alt, my) %>%
  mutate(n_ind_loc = sum(nb, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    # clé de localité (sans méthode ni det) + total ind. ici
    loc_key = paste(
      paste0(city_fmt, " (", num_dpt_fmt, ")"),
      habitat,
      paste0(alt, " m asl"),
      paste0(my, " (", n_ind_loc, " ind.)"),
      sep = ", "
    ),

    # event = méthode + (♂/♀/juv) + det.
    event = purrr::pmap_chr(
      list(method2, counts, determinateur),
      \(method2, counts, determinateur) {
        base <- str_squish(paste(c(method2, counts), collapse = "; "))
        det_txt <- if (!is.na(determinateur) && determinateur != "") {
          paste0(" det. ", determinateur)
        } else ""
        paste0(base, det_txt)
      }
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(loc_key), loc_key != "", !is.na(event), event != "") %>%
  distinct(class, order_tax, family, valid_name, cd_nom, region_fmt, loc_key, event, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(class, order_tax, family, valid_name, cd_nom, region_fmt, loc_key) %>%
  summarise(
    lot_line = paste0(loc_key, ": ", paste(unique(event), collapse = " ; ")),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

class_levels <- c(
  "Clitellata",
  "Arachnida",
  "Chilopoda",
  "Diplopoda",
  "Symphyla",
  "Malacostraca",
  "Entognatha",
  "Insecta",
  "Gastropoda"
)

lots_species_region <- lots %>%
  mutate(lot_line = str_squish(lot_line)) %>%
  group_by(class, order_tax, family, valid_name, cd_nom, region_fmt) %>%
  summarise(
    lot_lines = list(unique(lot_line)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(class = factor(class, levels = class_levels)) %>%
  arrange(class, order_tax, family, valid_name, region_fmt)


```

# 7. Species accounts (Zoosystema-style)

```{r species-accounts, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
# helper: construire le "Material examined" avec retours à la ligne entre régions
make_material_by_region_inline <- function(regions, lines_by_region,
                                           sep_within = " • ",
                                           sep_between_regions = " ; ",
                                           max_bytes = 20000) {
  region_blocks <- purrr::map2_chr(regions, lines_by_region, \(r, x) {
    x <- x[!is.na(x) & nzchar(x)]
    if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)

    # Région en petites majuscules
    paste0("<span style='font-variant: small-caps;'>", r, "</span>: ",
       paste(x, collapse = sep_within))

  })

  region_blocks <- region_blocks[!is.na(region_blocks) & nzchar(region_blocks)]

  # On reste sur une seule ligne : séparation par " ; "
  collapse_safe(region_blocks, sep = sep_between_regions, max_bytes = max_bytes)
}

species_blocks <- lots_species_region %>%
  group_by(class, order_tax, family, valid_name, cd_nom) %>%
  summarise(
      header = fmt_taxon_header(valid_name, cd_nom),
      chunks = list(
      make_material_by_region_inline(
            regions = region_fmt,
            lines_by_region = lot_lines,
            sep_within = " • ",
            sep_between_regions = " ; ",
            max_bytes = 20000
            )
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  unnest_longer(chunks, indices_to = "chunk_id") %>%
  mutate(
      material = if_else(
      chunk_id == 1L,
      paste0("Material examined —\n", chunks, "."),
      paste0("Material examined (cont.) —\n", chunks, ".")
      )
  ) %>%
  unique()


for (cl in unique(species_blocks$class)) {

  cat(fix_utf8(paste0("\n\n# Class ", cl, "\n\n")))

  cc <- species_blocks %>%
    filter(class == cl) %>%
    arrange(order_tax, family, valid_name)

  for (ord in unique(cc$order_tax)) {

    cat(fix_utf8(paste0("\n\n## Order ", ord, "\n\n")))

    oo <- cc %>%
      filter(order_tax == ord) %>%
      arrange(family, valid_name)

    for (fam in unique(oo$family)) {

      cat(fix_utf8(paste0("\n\n### Family ", fam, "\n\n")))

      ff <- oo %>% filter(family == fam)

      for (i in seq_len(nrow(ff))) {
        cat(fix_utf8(paste0(ff$header[i], "\n")))
        cat(fix_utf8(paste0(ff$material[i], "\n\n")))
      }
    }
  }

  cat("\n\\pagebreak\n")
}

```
